label: Surgery outcome
description: Base schema for SurgeryOutcomeEffectDef outcomes. The specific outcome schema is selected by the li Class attribute. Unknown Class values fall back to this base schema.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability that this outcome fires, evaluated via Rand.Chance after quality-based selection.

totalDamage.label: Total damage
totalDamage.description: Total body damage applied to the patient when this outcome fires.

applyEffectsToPart.label: Apply effects to part
applyEffectsToPart.description: If true, outcome effects target the surgically operated body part.

failure.label: Failure
failure.description: If true, this outcome is counted as a surgery failure.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Localized label for the outcome letter sent to the player.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Localized body text for the outcome letter sent to the player.
